#تريكات_Odoo_Advanced 😉 
موضوع النهاردة: أتمتة حساب إجمالي عدد المنتجات في أوامر البيع، الشراء، والمخازن 📊 الخيار الذكي البديل للآلة الحاسبة!
واحدة من أكتر الحاجات المزعجة للمحاسبين وأمناء المخازن لما يستلموا أو يبيعوا أوردر فيه 20 أو 30 صنف، هي إنهم يضطروا يجمعوا كميات السطور يدوياً عشان يتأكدوا إن إجمالي عدد القطع (Total Items/Qty) مظبوط مع الشحنة الفعلية.
في تريكة النهاردة، هوريك إزاي بـ Computed Field بسيط وسلس، تخلي أودو يحسب لك إجمالي عدد القطع جوه أمر البيع (Sales Order)، أمر الشراء (Purchase Order)، أو حتى إذن التحويل المخزني (Stock Transfer) تلقائياً ولحظياً!
✅ الفكرة والحل البرمجي: إضافة حقل مخصص (Custom Field) يعتمد على كود بايثون بسيط (Depends) بيلف على بنود الأوردر (Order Lines) ويجمع كل الكميات المكتوبة عشان يظهر لك الإجمالي في أسفل الصفحة جنب الضرائب والإجمالي المالي.
✅ النتائج اللي هتشوفها في الفيديو: 
1️⃣ سرعة الرقابة والجرد: أمين المخزن هيطابق إجمالي القطع في الكرتونة مع الرقم الظاهر على السيستم في ثانية واحدة. 
2️⃣ تطبيق مرن: الشرح هيغطّي إزاي تطبق التريكة دي في 3 موديولات أساسية (المبيعات، المشتريات، والمخازن). 
3️⃣ تحديث لحظي: بمجرد تعديل كمية أي صنف في السطور، إجمالي القطع بيتحدث تلقائياً بدون حاجة لحفظ الأوردر أولاً.
✅ الهدف النهائي: نلغي تماماً احتمالية الخطأ البشري في تجميع الكميات، ونوفر وقت فريق العمل في العمليات اليومية المتكررة. 🎯
السيستم الشاطر هو اللي بيوفر وقت موظفينه بلمحة عين. 🎯
شاهد الفيديو والكود المستخدم من هنا: [https://lnkd.in/datCvdjz] 🔗

AI Is Powerful. Experience Makes It Valuable.
Recently, there has been significant discussion around reports that Ford brought back experienced engineers after realizing that AI and automation alone were not delivering the expected quality outcomes. The lesson here is not that AI failed — the lesson is that AI without experience has limitations.

This creates an important message for all of us in the technology and business world:

AI is a tool. A very powerful one.

It can:

✅ Increase speed

✅ Automate repetitive tasks

✅ Process large amounts of information

✅ Improve productivity

But practical judgment, business understanding, real-world problem-solving, and years of hands-on experience cannot simply be replaced by algorithms.

The Ford example highlights a reality many organizations are beginning to understand: machines can assist, but experienced people provide context, direction, and decision-making.

As ERP professionals, we see the same reality across industries. Technology alone is not enough. Understanding business processes, operational challenges, workflows, and industry-specific requirements is what creates successful digital transformation.

With the right combination of experience + AI, we can deliver:

✅ Faster requirement analysis

✅ Early solution design and validation

✅ More accurate and business-focused ERP implementation

✅ Smarter automation strategies

✅ Faster project delivery with improved quality

Our experience helps us understand the business. AI helps us accelerate the process.

This combination allows us to provide early, scalable, and future-ready ERP solutions for any industry while ensuring that technology solves real business problems, not just technical ones.

We should stop thinking about "AI vs Humans" and start focusing on "AI + Humans."

Because technology can accelerate the process, but experience determines the direction.

AI may increase the speed of work. Experience ensures the work creates value.

#AI #ERP #Odoo #DigitalTransformation #BusinessSolutions #Innovation #FutureOfWork #Technology #ExperienceMatters #BusinessGrowth

Estoy buscando 10 partners/implementadores/agencias de Odoo que quieran probar OMI antes de que salga a la calle en serio. (no, no es IA)
OMI es una herramienta que armé para validar archivos de datos (CSV o Excel) contra las reglas reales de Odoo, del módulo, la versión y el país que corresponda, antes de importarlos. 

La idea me nació de ver el mismo problema una y otra vez en las migraciones: subís el archivo, importás, y recién ahí te enterás que faltaba un campo obligatorio o que el CUIT tenía mal el formato. OMI te lo avisa antes, no después.
Es determinístico, no usa inteligencia artificial. Las reglas se generan leyendo el código fuente real de Odoo, no son una lista armada a mano ni sacada de un foro.
Hoy valida los campos obligatorios de cada modelo según la versión de Odoo, el formato de email y teléfono, y el identificador fiscal correcto según el país: CUIT, RFC, RUT, CNPJ, NIT, RUC. Cubre 15 países de Latinoamérica, cada uno con su propio addon de localización. 
También chequea la coherencia contra los datos reales de Odoo, que una relación exista, que una opción de selección sea válida, no solo que el campo esté lleno. Detecta duplicados en columnas que deberían ser únicas, y reconoce los nombres de columna en español que trae un export típico (Correo, CUIT, Teléfono), así que no hace falta traducir nada antes de subir el archivo.
Cubre 8 módulos (Contactos, CRM, Ventas, Facturación, Inventario, Productos, Contabilidad, Compras) en 6 versiones de Odoo, de la v14 a la v19, incluidas las que ya no tienen soporte oficial, que es justo donde más se necesita migrar.

Lo que me falta ahora es algo (que no puedo simular yo solo): gente que migre datos de Odoo de verdad, con archivos de clientes reales, que use la herramienta y me diga dónde se cae.
Por eso abro 10 lugares. La propuesta es simple: usás OMI como si tuvieras el plan de 149 dólares al mes (hasta 5 proyectos exportados), sin pagar nada. A cambio te pido feedback en serio, un par de preguntas que ya tengo armadas, y en privado, nada público.

Si sos partner de Odoo y te gusta la idea de romper la herramienta (antes de que me la rompan otros clientes) escribime por DM.

linkedin_posts.post_text:
77.4% of organizations that finished an ERP project this year actually achieved the "removing silos" benefit they expected — up from 55.2% the year before, according to Panorama Consulting Group's 2026 ERP Report.

That gap says something ROI numbers don't: unifying data across finance, inventory, and sales takes time to show up. It rarely appears on go-live day — it builds as departments stop keeping separate versions of the same record.

Odoo solves this from day one with a single database instead of disconnected systems duplicating entries. When every department starts from one source of truth, a company doesn't need a year to see the benefit of breaking down silos.

Does your team work from the same data, or does each department keep its own version?

Source: Panorama Consulting Group — 2026 ERP Report

#Odoo #ERP #DataSilos #DigitalTransformation #CloudERP #BusinessIntelligence

77.4% من الشركات التي أنهت مشروع ERP خلال العام حققت فعلاً فائدة "كسر الجزر المعزولة" التي كانت تتوقعها، ارتفاعاً من 55.2% في العام السابق — وفق تقرير Panorama Consulting لعام 2026.

هذا الفارق يكشف ما لا تُظهره أرقام العائد على الاستثمار: توحيد البيانات بين المالية والمخزون والمبيعات يحتاج وقتاً ليظهر أثره. لا يتحقق يوم الانطلاق الفعلي، بل يتراكم حين تتوقف الأقسام عن الاحتفاظ بنسخ منفصلة من نفس السجل.

Odoo يحل هذه المشكلة من اليوم الأول عبر قاعدة بيانات واحدة بدل أنظمة متفرقة تكرر إدخال نفس المعلومة. حين تنطلق كل الأقسام من مصدر واحد للحقيقة، لا تحتاج الشركة سنة كاملة لترى فائدة كسر الجزر المعزولة.

هل الأقسام في شركتك تعمل من نفس البيانات، أم يحتفظ كل قسم بنسخته الخاصة؟

المصدر: Panorama Consulting Group — تقرير ERP لعام 2026

#Odoo #ERP #تخطيط_موارد_المؤسسات #DataSilos #التحول_الرقمي #CloudERP

The biggest bottleneck in business isn't people—it's manual processes.
When operations rely on spreadsheets, approvals, and disconnected systems, growth slows down.
With Odoo ERP, bring your Sales, Inventory, Manufacturing, Finance, CRM, and HR onto one intelligent platform—so your team spends less time managing processes and more time growing the business.
One Platform. Total Business Control.
📞 0302 2470640

#BusinessTransformation #SmartManufacturing #ProcessOptimization #OperationalExcellence #EnterpriseSoftware #BusinessSystems #Industry40

From Shop Floor to Boardroom , We Build Odoo That Fits Your Business
Every industry runs differently. That's why "one-size-fits-all" ERP never really fits anyone.
Over the past few months, we've been mapping out Odoo opportunities across a wide spectrum of businesses and the pattern is clear: whether you're in manufacturing, chemicals, automotive components, water treatment, industrial cleaning, or renewable energy, the underlying challenges are surprisingly similar:
✅ Disconnected systems for Sales, Inventory, and Accounting 
✅ No real-time visibility into production or field operations 
✅ Manual quality checks and maintenance tracking 
✅ Growing pains as teams scale past spreadsheets

That's exactly where Odoo implementation makes the difference.
🔧 What we help businesses unlock with Odoo: 
• Manufacturing & MRP : from shop floor to finished goods, with OEE and barcode tracking 
• Quality & Maintenance : proactive, not reactive 
• Project & PLM : engineering change management made simple 
• Field Service : dispatch, track, and invoice from one platform 
• CRM, Sales & Purchase : a single source of truth for your revenue engine 
• Accounting & Timesheet : clean financials, zero guesswork

Whether you're a precision engineering firm, a chemical manufacturer, or a renewable energy EPC company the right ERP isn't about adding software. It's about giving your team one system that actually reflects how you work.

if your business is still stitching together spreadsheets, disconnected tools, or legacy systems let's talk about what an Odoo implementation could look like for you.
OODU Implementers
Sagar Chaudhari

📌 Financial Statements Interview Series – Top Questions & Best Answers
If you're preparing for an Accounting interview, mastering Financial Statements is essential. They are the final output of the accounting cycle and the primary source of information used by management, investors, auditors, and other stakeholders to evaluate a company's financial performance.
In this guide, I covered some of the most frequently asked Financial Statements interview questions, including:
 ✅ What are Financial Statements?
 ✅ Why Financial Statements are Important
 ✅ The Main Types of Financial Statements
 ✅ Balance Sheet Analysis
 ✅ Income Statement Analysis
 ✅ Cash Flow Statement Analysis
 ✅ Relationship Between the Financial Statements
 ✅ Purpose of Financial Reporting
 ✅ Common Financial Statement Errors
 ✅ Best Practices to Ensure Accuracy
💡 Key Insight
Financial statements don't just report numbers—they tell the financial story of a business. Accurate reporting improves transparency, supports better decisions, and builds confidence among investors and stakeholders.
🎯 Interview Tip
During your interview, don't only define each financial statement. Explain how they are connected, how a single transaction flows through the accounting cycle, and how it ultimately impacts the company's financial position and performance.
A skilled accountant doesn't just prepare financial statements—they understand the story behind every figure.

📌 سلسلة مقابلات المحاسبة – أهم أسئلة وأجوبة القوائم المالية
إذا كنت تستعد لمقابلة عمل في مجال المحاسبة، فمن الضروري أن تمتلك فهمًا عميقًا للقوائم المالية، فهي تمثل النتيجة النهائية للدورة المحاسبية، وتعتمد عليها الإدارة والمستثمرون والمراجعون في تقييم الأداء المالي واتخاذ القرارات.
في هذا المنشور ستتعرف على أشهر الأسئلة التي تتكرر في مقابلات العمل الخاصة بالقوائم المالية، ومنها:
 ✅ ما هي القوائم المالية؟
 ✅ لماذا تعد القوائم المالية مهمة؟
 ✅ أنواع القوائم المالية الرئيسية
 ✅ كيفية تحليل قائمة المركز المالي
 ✅ كيفية تحليل قائمة الدخل
 ✅ كيفية تحليل قائمة التدفقات النقدية
 ✅ العلاقة بين القوائم المالية
 ✅ الهدف من إعداد التقارير المالية
 ✅ أشهر الأخطاء التي تؤثر على القوائم المالية
 ✅ أفضل الممارسات لضمان دقة القوائم المالية
💡 معلومة مهمة
القوائم المالية ليست مجرد أرقام، بل هي وسيلة لعرض الأداء الحقيقي للمنشأة ومركزها المالي، وكلما كانت البيانات دقيقة كانت القرارات الإدارية والاستثمارية أكثر جودة وموثوقية.
🎯 نصيحة للمقابلات
عند الإجابة عن الأسئلة المتعلقة بالقوائم المالية، لا تكتفِ بشرح وظيفة كل قائمة، بل وضح العلاقة بينها، وكيف تنتقل العملية المالية منذ تسجيلها وحتى ظهور أثرها في القوائم المالية. هذا الأسلوب يعكس فهمًا عمليًا للدورة المحاسبية ويمنحك أفضلية أثناء المقابلة.
المحاسب المتميز لا يكتفي بإعداد القوائم المالية، بل يستطيع تحليلها واستخلاص المعلومات التي تساعد على تقييم أداء المنشأة واتخاذ قرارات مالية سليمة.

Still using Excel to run your business?

Excel is an excellent tool.

But as your business grows, managing inventory, sales, purchasing, accounting, and customer information across multiple spreadsheets becomes difficult.

Common signs you've outgrown spreadsheets:
📌 Duplicate data entry
📌 Different versions of the same file
📌 Time spent searching for information
📌 Manual reports at the end of every month
📌 Increased risk of costly errors

An ERP system brings all your business processes together in one place, giving you real-time visibility and helping your team work more efficiently.

The goal isn't to replace what works—it's to eliminate repetitive tasks so you can focus on growing your business.

At Novalith Systems, we help businesses in the UAE streamline their operations with Odoo ERP, making everyday work simpler, faster, and more connected.
What is the biggest challenge your business faces with spreadsheets today?

How Odoo Helps Manufacturing Companies: One Platform. Every Process. Total Control. 🏭⚙️📈

Running a modern factory floor with manual processes creates a constant cycle of operational friction. When production schedules, inventory planning, and floor monitoring operate in disconnected silos, hidden inefficiencies damage your margins, delay deliveries, and limit your factory's true output potential.

At M2 Design Yield Pvt Ltd, an Official Odoo Partner, we transform chaotic factory floor operations into highly synchronized workflows. By implementing an all-in-one Odoo business management ecosystem, we bridge the gap between planning and execution—giving your leadership team real-time insights and complete control over every single production stage.

Breaking Down the Manufacturing Transformation:

❌ 01. Common Industry Challenges:
Manual production tracking that slows down floor operations.
Unexpected inventory shortages that stall assembly lines.
Delayed customer orders due to disconnected tracking systems.
Poor material planning and resource scheduling.
A critical lack of real-time visibility across the shop floor.

✔️ 02. How Odoo Solives Them:
Real-Time Monitoring: Track active production lines and machine status live.
Smart Inventory Management: Maintain absolute precision over raw materials and finished goods.

Automated Work Orders & Scheduling: Automatically route assembly tasks to the right work centers.

Demand Forecasting & Planning: Align raw material purchasing with accurate market demand projections.

Centralized Data & Reporting: Unify all operational metrics into a single source of truth.

✨ 03. Key Enterprise Benefits:
⏱️ Faster Production Cycles: Bring your products to market with zero operational lag.
💰 Lower Operational Costs: Eliminate wasted labor hours and duplicate system licenses.
🛡️ Fewer Errors & Waste: Maximize material yields with error-free automated scheduling.
📊 Better Resource Utilization: Keep machines, materials, and labor perfectly balanced.
⭐ Higher Customer Satisfaction: Fulfill large-scale orders on time, every single time.

Built for Modern Industrial Scaling:
🧩 All-in-One Business Management  
🔄 Seamless Integration  
📊 Real-time Insights 
🚀 Scalable & Future Ready

🏔️ Not all ERP systems are built for the same journey.

One of the biggest mistakes businesses make?

Choosing an ERP based on popularity instead of business needs.

The “best” ERP isn’t the most expensive one.

It’s the one that fits your business today while supporting where you want to be tomorrow.

Think of ERP systems like climbing mountains. ⛰️

🌱 Startups & Small Businesses

Odoo | Zoho

✔️ Affordable

✔️ Easy to implement

✔️ Ideal for businesses beginning their digital journey

⸻

📈 Growing Businesses

Microsoft Dynamics 365

✔️ Strong mid-market capabilities

✔️ Flexible finance, sales, and operations

✔️ Scales with business growth

⸻

🏭 Small & Medium Enterprises (SMEs)

SAP Business One

✔️ Finance

✔️ Procurement

✔️ Inventory

✔️ Manufacturing

✔️ CRM

✔️ Real-time reporting

A powerful ERP for companies that have outgrown spreadsheets but don’t yet need an enterprise platform.

⸻

☁️ Rapidly Scaling Organizations

Oracle NetSuite

✔️ Cloud-native ERP

✔️ Multi-company support

✔️ Global financial management

✔️ Strong scalability

⸻

🌍 Large Enterprises

SAP S/4HANA

✔️ Intelligent ERP

✔️ Real-time analytics

✔️ End-to-end business integration

✔️ AI, automation, and digital transformation

Designed for complex global organizations.

⸻

🏢 Enterprise Financial Operations

Oracle ERP Cloud

✔️ Advanced financial management

✔️ Procurement

✔️ Risk & compliance

✔️ Enterprise performance management

⸻

💡 The Right ERP Depends On

✅ Company size

✅ Industry

✅ Budget

✅ Business processes

✅ Future growth plans

The highest mountain isn’t always the right one to climb.

Sometimes the smartest decision is choosing the ERP that matches your current stage—and grows with your business.

Because an ERP should enable growth, not become a burden.

💬 Which ERP have you worked with—and what do you like most about it?

Most growing businesses don't have one operations problem. They have five separate tools creating the same problem in five different places.

Finance reconciled here. Inventory tracked there. HR in a spreadsheet. Sales pipeline in a CRM that doesn't connect to fulfilment. Customer queries handled somewhere else entirely.

Every handoff is a point where data degrades, time is lost, and decisions get made on numbers that are already out of date.

Odoo consolidates all of it; finance, inventory, HR, sales, manufacturing, projects into one platform, built around how your business actually works.

QAAgility Technologies is a certified Odoo partner with 10+ years of ERP delivery experience. We implement Odoo with a QA-first approach — structured UAT, integration testing, and data migration validation built into every project from day one.

No workarounds. No surprise go-lives. Just Odoo working the way it should.
Book your free discovery session → https://lnkd.in/gC-4nv74

With Odoo School Management, you can:
